root_cause: Gemini OUTPUT truncation at maxOutputTokens=8192. buildExtractionPrompt injected 17-32 tracking URLs + up to 30 anchor pairs and asked Gemini to echo a long redirect URL into every job's jobUrl. A 20-25 job digest needed >8192 output tokens -> finishReason=MAX_TOKENS -> JSON array cut off mid-record with no closing ] -> extractor /\[[\s\S]*\]/ regex returned null -> [] -> processOneEmail misfiled the email as NoJobs.
fix: extractor.js buildExtractionPrompt: removed urlSection + anchorSection injection and the jobUrl schema field/rules. Kept company/companyDescription/jobTitle/location/min+maxSalary/salaryPeriod/employmentType/workArrangement/experienceLevel/confidence.

extractJobDetailsSimple: stopped building/passing urlSection/anchorSection (removed dead URL filter + dedup block + ANCHOR_NOISE_DOMAINS/ANCHOR_TRACKING_SUBDOMAIN_RE constants). Job URL and URL Status sheet columns kept but always set to '' (removed feature, not a fallback). extractTextFromHtml still returns extractedUrls/anchorPairs for signature stability.

Hardened parser: new salvageTruncatedJobArray() recovers complete records from a truncated array (substring first [ -> last } + ]) on both the null-regex-match and JSON.parse-throw paths; returns [] when unsalvageable, then extractJobsFallback. Documented as the approved recovery for MAX_TOKENS truncation.
api-service.js callGemini: logs Gemini finishReason and emits a distinct 'output was truncated' warning on MAX_TOKENS. maxOutputTokens UNCHANGED (8192). 429/503 backoff UNCHANGED.
verification: Oscar PASS. Ernie PASS (no Critical/Warning). Telly PASS. Zoe PASS via live mutation testing (salvage return-[] -> RED; prompt re-inject -> RED; MAX_TOKENS warning false-pass found and FIXED in-review so warning branch is now isolated). Sources restored byte-identical after mutations.
backlog_items: Full removal of the URL pathway: drop extractedUrls/anchorPairs params + extractAnchorPairs + Job URL/URL Status SHEET_COLUMNS entirely (kept this leg for sheet-schema compatibility).
Carried over: OPTION convert email HTML -> Markdown before Gemini.
Carried over: deprecate legacy src/core/gmail-service.js once non-feature callers migrate.
summary: Fixed NoJobs misfiling caused by Gemini output truncation: dropped URL/anchor/jobUrl output bloat from the extraction prompt and added an approved salvage parser for MAX_TOKENS-truncated arrays, plus finishReason logging. Behavior otherwise identical; maxOutputTokens untouched.
